query: SELECT sc.sigla, s.nome, sc.submenus FROM setor_config sc JOIN setores s ON sc.setorId = s.id WHERE sc.sigla IN ('CON', 'CRE', 'TRA', 'JUR', 'CTN') ORDER BY sc.sigla;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 49151bcmSzJvACt.c1decb00aa64 --database i9dRshPFnDefFw9MJLeLri --execute SELECT sc.sigla, s.nome, sc.submenus FROM setor_config sc JOIN setores s ON sc.setorId = s.id WHERE sc.sigla IN ('CON', 'CRE', 'TRA', 'JUR', 'CTN') ORDER BY sc.sigla;
